activities.name: Copy New LP markets
activities.description: Copy new LP markets into REF table for Funnel

source.sqlReaderQuery:
With FunnelMarket as (
 Select Distinct
				  Case
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%FHIA%' then 'FHI'
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%HomeSmart%' then 'HSI'
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%MadCity%' then 'MAC'
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%MaxHome%' then 'FHI'
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%RiteWindow%' then 'RTW'
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%StatewideRemodeling%' then 'SWR'
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%PacificBath%' or replace(Account,' ','') Like '%HomeForeverBaths%' then 'PBC'
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%Paradise%' then 'PHI'
					when replace(Account,' ','') like '%ClosetAmerica%' then 'CTA'
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%RenuityHome%' then 
				  			Case when Campaign like '%FHI%' then 'FHI'
				  				When Campaign like '%SWR%' then 'SWR'
				  				When Campaign like '%RTW%' then 'RTW'
				  				When (Campaign like '%MXH%' or Campaign like '%MAX%') then 'FHI'
				  				When (Campaign like '%MAC%' or Campaign like '%MCW%') then 'MAC'
				  				When Campaign like '%PBC%' then 'PBC'
				  				When Campaign like '%PHI%' then 'PHI'--Renuity Home
				  				When Campaign like '%HSI%' then 'HSI' 
				  				When Campaign like '%Garage%' then 'CTA-GS' end 
				  	when replace(Account,' ','') like '%RenuityCoatings%' then  'CTA-GS' 
				  end as Division ,
				  Account,
				  Replace(Replace(Market,',',''),'.','') as Market 
			from ODS.Funnel_Ad_performance_metrics
			Where Traffic_source='Google' and Market is not null
)
Select Distinct FM.*,RF.LP_Market, NULL as LP_ReportingmarketID, 'Unmapped' As Flag, Getdate() createdTS, Getdate() as LastUpdatedTS

from FunnelMarket FM Left Join RDM.REF_FUNNEL_AD_Market RF on FM.Division=RF.Division and FM.Market=RF.DMARegion
where FM.Division is not null and RF.LP_Market is NULL
